content: poverty 贫困、短缺the poverty of imaginationguilty 有罪的、内疚的The jury finds the prisoner guilty 陪审团裁定犯人有罪primary 最初的、首要的、初等的、小学的、原来的China is currently in the primary stage of socialism.vice 恶习、罪恶、缺点、代理、副职Virtue and vice are different.The vice president was the president’s successor.offender 得罪人的人；犯罪者；违法者He is always an offender on any occasion.The offender was finally arrested.罪犯终于被捕了afford 买得起、但付得起、有时间做、给予The police will afford protection.No country can afford to neglect education.任何国家都不容忽视教育。

title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing
Run server$ hexo server

More info: Server
Generate static files$ hexo generate

More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment
